title: Seller Intelligence Input
description: Scrape seller/store profiles across Trendyol, Hepsiburada, and N11.

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Marketplaces to include in this run.

sellerUrls.title: Seller URLs
sellerUrls.description: Direct seller/store profile URLs to scrape.

searchBySeller.title: Search by Seller
searchBySeller.description: Seller/store name to look up across the selected marketplaces.

searchByCategory.title: Search by Category
searchByCategory.description: Category keyword used to discover top sellers through marketplace search pages.

maxSellers.title: Max Sellers
maxSellers.description: Maximum number of seller profiles to emit into the dataset.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify proxy configuration. Residential proxies with Turkish IP preference are used by default.
